title: Use only OC-validated XPath functions in expressions
description: Expressions in relevant, constraint, calculation, and default columns must use functions from the OpenClinica Validated Functions Index (OC4 docs §2.4.6.1). Non-validated XPath functions (fn:* namespace, custom Enketo-only functions) cause silent OC rejection or runtime evaluation failure.
rationale: OC4's expression evaluator validates against a specific allowlist. Functions outside that list parse cleanly in pyxform but fail when OC executes the expression at data-entry time. The safe-function list — today, now, selected, count-selected, string-length, regex, coalesce, substr, date, decimal-date-time, format-date, int, number, round, if, once, position, concat, upper-case, lower-case — covers nearly all clinical-trial expression needs.

effect.soft: Audit the expression text against the OC4 Validated Functions Index. Flag any function name outside the allowlist (today, now, selected, count-selected, string-length, regex, coalesce, substr, date, decimal-date-time, format-date, int, number, round, if, once, position, concat, upper-case, lower-case). Prefer simpler expressions when uncertain.

history.note: Imported from prompts.py RULE OC-1 during Phase B.1a. Hybrid kind: allowlist enforceable mechanically, full expression-grammar validation requires AI judgment.
